title: LeadMagnet Input
description: Configure what business leads to scrape from Google Maps

query.title: Business Type
query.description: What kind of business? Examples: dentist, plumber, restaurant, hotel, real estate agent

location.title: Location
location.description: Where to search? Examples: Austin TX, London UK, New York NY

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of leads to collect (1-100)

extractEmails.title: Extract Emails
extractEmails.description: Visit each business website to find email addresses (slower but more data)

extractReviews.title: Extract Reviews
extractReviews.description: Extract customer reviews for each place (slower but includes full review data)

maxReviewsPerPlace.title: Max Reviews Per Place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: Maximum number of reviews to extract per place (1-20)

extractAmenities.title: Extract Amenities
extractAmenities.description: Extract features and amenities (wifi, parking, wheelchair accessible, etc.)

extractImages.title: Extract Images
extractImages.description: Extract business photos from Google Maps (slower)
